title: Electrode plates and electrochemical appliance comprising the electrode plates

events.title: Application filed by Ningde Amperex Technology Ltd

classifications.description: Processes of manufacture of electrodes based on carbonaceous material, e.g. graphite-intercalation compounds or CFx
Rocking-chair batteries, i.e. batteries with lithium insertion or intercalation in both electrodes; Lithium-ion batteries
Methods of deposition of the material by coating on electrode collectors
Silicon or alloys based on silicon

Selection of substances as active materials, active masses, active liquids of inorganic oxides or hydroxides of nickel, cobalt or iron of mixed oxides or hydroxides containing iron, cobalt or nickel for inserting or intercalating light metals, e.g. LiNiO2, LiCoO2 or LiCoOxFy
Oxygenated metallic salts or polyanionic structures, e.g. borates, phosphates, silicates, olivines
Carbonaceous material, e.g. graphite-intercalation compounds or CFx for inserting or intercalating light metals
Composites in the form of layers, e.g. coatings
Carriers or collectors characterised by shape or form
Physical characteristics, e.g. porosity, surface area

abstract: The present application relates to electrode pads and electrochemical devices including the electrode pads. The anode sheet described in the present application includes an anode first region and an anode second region, wherein the capacity per unit area Cs A2 of the second anode region is greater than or equal to the capacity per unit area Cs A1 of the first anode region. The cathode electrode sheet described in this application includes a cathode first region and a cathode second region, wherein the per unit area capacity Cs C2 of the cathode second region is less than or equal to 98% of the per unit area capacity Cs C1 of the cathode first region . When the anode electrode sheet and/or the cathode electrode sheet described in the present application is applied to an electrochemical device, the formation of lithium dendrites can be effectively reduced, and the safety of the electrochemical device can be improved.
abstract_original: 本申请涉及电极极片和包含所述电极极片的电化学装置。本申请所述的阳极极片包括阳极第一区和阳极第二区，其中所述阳极第二区的单位面积容量CsA2大于或等于所述阳极第一区的单位面积容量CsA1。本申请所述的阴极极片包括阴极第一区和阴极第二区，其中所述阴极第二区的单位面积容量CsC2小于或等于所述阴极第一区的单位面积容量CsC1的98％。当将本申请所述的阳极极片和/或阴极极片应用于电化学装置时，能够有效地降低锂枝晶的形成，改善电化学装置的安全性。
claims:
1. a kind of anode pole piece comprising the secondth area of the firstth area of anode and anode,
      The wherein capacity per unit area Cs in secondth area of anodeA2More than or equal to the capacity per unit area in firstth area of anode
CsA1。

2. anode pole piece according to claim 1, wherein the firstth area of the anode includes the body region of the anode pole piece,
Secondth area of anode includes the marginal zone of the anode pole piece.

3. anode pole piece according to claim 1, wherein the thickness of the anode pole piece in the secondth area of the anode is less than described
The thickness of the anode pole piece in the firstth area of anode.

4. anode pole piece according to claim 1, wherein the firstth area of the anode and the secondth area of the anode respectively include
Different anode active materials.

5. anode pole piece according to claim 1, wherein
      The theoretical specific capacity of the anode active material in firstth area of anode is less than the anode active material in secondth area of anode
Theoretical specific capacity.

6. anode pole piece according to claim 1 further includes anode third area,
      Wherein anode third area includes ceramics.

7. anode pole piece according to claim 1 further includes the 4th area of anode,
      The wherein capacity per unit area Cs in the 4th area of anodeA4More than or equal to the capacity per unit area in secondth area of anode
CsA2。

8. a kind of cathode sheet comprising the secondth area of the firstth area of cathode and cathode,
      The wherein capacity per unit area Cs in secondth area of cathodeC2Less than or equal to the capacity per unit area in firstth area of cathode
CsC198%.

9. cathode sheet according to claim 8, wherein the firstth area of the cathode includes the body region of the cathode sheet,
And secondth area of cathode includes the marginal zone of the cathode sheet.

10. cathode sheet according to claim 8, wherein the thickness of the cathode sheet in the secondth area of the cathode is less than described
The thickness of the cathode sheet in the firstth area of cathode.

11. cathode sheet according to claim 8, wherein the firstth area of the cathode and the secondth area of the cathode respectively include
Different cathode active materials.

12. cathode sheet according to claim 8, wherein the firstth area of the cathode includes ternary material and/or cobalt acid lithium,
And secondth area of cathode includes LiFePO4.

13. cathode sheet according to claim 8, wherein
      The theoretical specific capacity of the cathode active material in firstth area of cathode is greater than the cathode active material in secondth area of cathode
Theoretical specific capacity.

14. cathode sheet according to claim 8 further includes cathode third area,
      Wherein cathode third area includes ceramics.

15. cathode sheet according to claim 8 further includes the 4th area of cathode,
      The wherein capacity per unit area Cs in the 4th area of cathodeC4Less than or equal to the capacity per unit area in secondth area of cathode
CsC2。

16. a kind of battery core comprising:
      Cathode sheet, the cathode sheet include the secondth area of the firstth area of cathode and cathode；
      Anode pole piece, the anode pole piece include the secondth area of the firstth area of anode and anode；
      The wherein numerical value CB in the firstth area1For the capacity per unit area Cs in firstth area of anodeA1With the list in firstth area of cathode
Plane accumulates capacity C sC1Ratio,
      The wherein numerical value CB in the secondth area2For the capacity per unit area Cs in secondth area of anodeA2With the list in secondth area of cathode
Plane accumulates capacity C sC2Ratio, and
      Wherein CB2≥CB1。

17. battery core according to claim 16, wherein the anode pole piece is sun described in any one of claim 1-5
Pole pole piece and/or the cathode sheet are cathode sheet described in any one of claim 8-13.

18. battery core according to claim 16, wherein the anode pole piece further includes anode third area and/or anode the 4th
Area,
      Wherein anode third area includes ceramics,
      The wherein capacity per unit area Cs in the 4th area of anodeA4More than or equal to the capacity per unit area in secondth area of anode
CsA2。

19. battery core according to claim 16, wherein the cathode sheet further includes cathode third area and/or cathode the 4th
Area,
      Wherein cathode third area includes ceramics,
      The wherein capacity per unit area Cs in the 4th area of cathodeC4Less than or equal to the capacity per unit area in secondth area of cathode
CsC2。
